coverage_statement: Every class code in this finite vocabulary has exactly one C/V/X type. Any event outside the vocabulary is not silently accepted; it is emitted as an UNCLASSIFIED residue.

extractor_x_class_codes.X_EXTRACTOR_GF2_GAUSSIAN_ELIMINATION: GF(2) Gaussian elimination adjoins a hidden parity extractor
extractor_x_class_codes.X_EXTRACTOR_NATIVE_XOR_ELIMINATION: native XOR elimination recovers hidden parity structure
extractor_x_class_codes.X_EXTRACTOR_NONPUBLIC_PARITY_BASIS: solver uses a non-public parity basis

public_c_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_BIT_XOR: public Boolean XOR gate over public bits only
public_c_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_BRANCH: branch on a public control bit
public_c_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_COPY: copy public register or tape content
public_c_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_DPLL_SCAN_CLAUSE: public clause scan over DIMACS literals
public_c_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_INPUT_READ: read a public input bit or symbol

public_machine_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_BIT_XOR: public Boolean XOR gate over public bits only
public_machine_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_BRANCH: branch on a public control bit
public_machine_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_COPY: copy public register or tape content
public_machine_class_codes.C_PUBLIC_INPUT_READ: read a public input bit or symbol

visible_v_class_codes.V_VISIBLE_COMMUTATOR_WALL_CROSSING: visible commutator wall crossing with replayable public boundary
visible_v_class_codes.V_VISIBLE_PUBLIC_BOUNDARY_TRANSPORT: visible boundary transport with public replay data
